lessons.description: Learn proven AI-powered marketing strategies to grow your audience and increase revenue.

lessons.title: មេរៀន និងកម្រងគន្លឹះសរសេរ Prompt កម្រិតខ្ពស់
lessons.description: AI Prompt Engineering Masterclass ដោយផ្អែកលើបច្ចេកទេសទំនើបៗ និងបទពិសោធន៍ជាក់ស្តែង ដើម្បីជួយឲ្យអ្នកបញ្ជា AI បានលទ្ធផលត្រឹមត្រូវ ចំគោលដៅ និងមានគុណភាពខ្ពស់បំផុត។

lessons.description: Master the basics of ChatGPT — from creating your account to having your first productive conversation.

lessons.title: Introduction to AI
lessons.description: Understand what AI is, how it works, and why it matters for your career and business.

lessons.title: Prompt Engineering Basics
lessons.description: Learn how to write effective prompts that get better results from any AI tool.
